nodes.text:
Progressive rectal bleeding with new onset anaemia symptoms; fatigue over 2 weeks. Additional symptoms include early satiety.

Imaging:
CT TAP on 10/06/2024: transverse colon lesion with multiple enlarged mesenteric nodes; no liver mets. T4a N1 EMVI- M0
